languages.text: "...архонт Детей Шипов, одного из ведущих кабалов Нексуса. Выдающаяся представительница своего рода, Мать Теней стояла за полным изничтожением двух десятков соперничающих кабалов".

traits.locale_text: "Мать Теней — архонт Детей Шипов, одного из ведущих кабалов Нексуса. Выдающаяся представительница своего рода, стоявшая за полным изничтожением двух десятков соперничающих кабалов".

languages.text: "...the Archon of the Children of Thorns, one of the leading Kabals of the Nexus. A prominent member of her kind, the Mother of Shadows was behind the complete annihilation of two dozen rival Kabals."
languages.original_text: "...архонт Детей Шипов, одного из ведущих кабалов Нексуса. Выдающаяся представительница своего рода, Мать Теней стояла за полным изничтожением двух десятков соперничающих кабалов".

traits.locale_text: "...the Archon of the Children of Thorns, one of the leading Kabals of the Nexus. A prominent member of her kind, the Mother of Shadows was behind the complete annihilation of two dozen rival Kabals."

"The Mother of Shadows is the Archon of the Children of Thorns, one of the leading Kabals of the Nexus. A prominent member of her kind, she was behind the complete annihilation of two dozen rival Kabals."

"...the Archon of the Children of Thorns, one of the leading Kabals of the Nexus. A prominent member of her kind, the Mother of Shadows was behind the complete annihilation of two dozen rival Kabals."

languages.text: “……暗影枢纽最强大的阴谋团之一——荆棘之子的执政官。暗影之母在族中地位显赫，曾一手策划并毁灭了二十多个敌对阴谋团。”
languages.original_text: "...the Archon of the Children of Thorns, one of the leading Kabals of the Nexus. A prominent member of her kind, the Mother of Shadows was behind the complete annihilation of two dozen rival Kabals."

traits.locale_text: “……暗影枢纽最强大的阴谋团之一——荆棘之子的执政官。暗影之母在族中地位显赫，曾一手策划并毁灭了二十多个敌对阴谋团。”

languages.text: « ... l'archonte des Enfants des épines, l'une des principales kabales du Nexus. En tant que membre éminente, la Mère des ombres était à l'origine de l'anéantissement de plusieurs dizaines de kabales rivales. »
languages.original_text: "...the Archon of the Children of Thorns, one of the leading Kabals of the Nexus. A prominent member of her kind, the Mother of Shadows was behind the complete annihilation of two dozen rival Kabals."

traits.locale_text: « ... l'archonte des Enfants des épines, l'une des principales kabales du Nexus. En tant que membre éminente, la Mère des ombres était à l'origine de l'anéantissement de plusieurs dizaines de kabales rivales. »

languages.text: «...la Arconte de los Hijos de las Espinas, una de las principales Kábalas del Nexo. La Madre de las Sombras era una miembro destacado de su especie y fue responsable de la aniquilación de dos docenas de Kábalas rivales».
languages.original_text: "...the Archon of the Children of Thorns, one of the leading Kabals of the Nexus. A prominent member of her kind, the Mother of Shadows was behind the complete annihilation of two dozen rival Kabals."

traits.locale_text: «...la Arconte de los Hijos de las Espinas, una de las principales Kábalas del Nexo. La Madre de las Sombras era una miembro destacado de su especie y fue responsable de la aniquilación de dos docenas de Kábalas rivales».

languages.text: "Neksus'un önde gelen bir Kabalı olan Dikenlerin Evlatları'nın Arkonu'dur. Türünün öne çıkan bir mensubu olan Gölgelerin Anası, yirmi kadar rakip Kabal'ın tamamen yok edilmesini emretmiştir."
languages.original_text: "...the Archon of the Children of Thorns, one of the leading Kabals of the Nexus. A prominent member of her kind, the Mother of Shadows was behind the complete annihilation of two dozen rival Kabals."

traits.locale_text: "Neksus'un önde gelen bir Kabalı olan Dikenlerin Evlatları'nın Arkonu'dur. Türünün öne çıkan bir mensubu olan Gölgelerin Anası, yirmi kadar rakip Kabal'ın tamamen yok edilmesini emretmiştir."

languages.text: "... die Archontin der Kinder der Dornen, einer der führenden Kabale des Nexus. Als prominentes Mitglied ihrer Art ließ die Mutter der Schatten zwei Dutzend rivalisierende Kabale vollständig auslöschen."
languages.original_text: "...the Archon of the Children of Thorns, one of the leading Kabals of the Nexus. A prominent member of her kind, the Mother of Shadows was behind the complete annihilation of two dozen rival Kabals."

traits.locale_text: "... die Archontin der Kinder der Dornen, einer der führenden Kabale des Nexus. Als prominentes Mitglied ihrer Art ließ die Mutter der Schatten zwei Dutzend rivalisierende Kabale vollständig auslöschen."

languages.text: 「…棘の子のアーコン、ネクサスの主要なカバルの1つ。彼女の種族の有力者である影の母は、20ほどの敵対カバルを完全に滅ぼした。」
languages.original_text: "...the Archon of the Children of Thorns, one of the leading Kabals of the Nexus. A prominent member of her kind, the Mother of Shadows was behind the complete annihilation of two dozen rival Kabals."

traits.locale_text: 「…棘の子のアーコン、ネクサスの主要なカバルの1つ。彼女の種族の有力者である影の母は、20ほどの敵対カバルを完全に滅ぼした。」
